subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon! Hearken unto My most sweet call, which guideth thee unto a station that thou canst not fathom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل الی الافق الاعلی اسمع ندائی الاحلی انه یرشدک الی مقام لاتجد
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Jews, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @proclamation to Muslims, @proclamation to Christians, @eulogies; reminiscences
